_comment: Held-out fixture for trp-fix-task.contract.test.ts. NOT shipped under tests/fixtures/workflows/ so the parity fixture set stays independent of the contract test. Picks a distinctive SEC id (SEC-42-HOLDOUT) and a simple happy path: solve mode, 1 pinned file, exactly 2 cheap CI commands (both passing), so PreflightAutofix / PreflightRevise do not fire.

args.task_intent: Add an algorithms allow-list to jwt.verify in the API auth middleware so tokens signed with an unexpected alg are rejected.
args.task_raw: Reviewer flagged that apps/api/src/auth/verify.ts calls jwt.verify without an explicit algorithms option. Add the allow-list and cover with a regression test.

pinned_files.content_first_200_lines:
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
export function verify(token, secret) { return jwt.verify(token, secret); }

acceptance_criteria: jwt.verify calls include an algorithms allow-list
asymmetric-alg tokens are rejected by the verifier

files_to_modify.rationale: Pin the algorithms allow-list so alg=none / asymmetric-alg tokens are rejected.
Regression test that fails without the algorithms allow-list.

test_additions.fails_without_fix: Without the allow-list, jwt.verify accepts the alg=none token and the throw assertion fails.

pr_body_sections.summary: Pin the algorithms allow-list on jwt.verify so tokens signed with an unexpected alg are rejected.
pr_body_sections.test_plan: pnpm --filter api run test — new verify.test.ts asserts alg=none tokens throw.
pr_body_sections.rollback_plan: git revert the merge commit; no data migrations. No user re-auth required.

fix_item_coverage.item: jwt.verify calls include an algorithms allow-list
asymmetric-alg tokens are rejected by the verifier
fix_item_coverage.evidence: jsonwebtoken rejects tokens whose alg is not in the allow-list; regression test covers alg=none.

refute_attempts.claim: Patch delivers the task intent: jwt.verify pins the algorithms allow-list
refute_attempts.evidence: apps/api/src/auth/verify.ts line 3 passes { algorithms: ['HS256'] } to jwt.verify explicitly.

refute_attempts.claim: Regression test would fail on the pinned pre-fix source
refute_attempts.evidence: verify.test.ts asserts throw on alg=none; pre-fix verify.ts has no allow-list so jwt.verify would not throw.

nice_to_haves: Consider RS256 as well if the service also verifies asymmetric tokens.

Adversarial:completeness-refuter.reason: all items closed by the bundle
Adversarial:completeness-refuter.evidence: verify.ts passes algorithms allow-list and verify.test.ts covers alg=none rejection end-to-end.

per_item.item_text: jwt.verify calls include an algorithms allow-list
per_item.evidence: apps/api/src/auth/verify.ts line 3 passes { algorithms: ['HS256'] } to jwt.verify.

per_item.item_text: asymmetric-alg tokens are rejected by the verifier
per_item.evidence: verify.test.ts asserts throw on alg=none; jsonwebtoken rejects out-of-list algs at verify time.
